EmailTemplate.description: This email template is used for sending invoices to lessees via bulk invoicing.
EmailTemplate.name: Bulk Invoicing Send Email Template
EmailTemplate.subject: [Lessee Name] | [MSN(s)] | [Month- Year] | [Invoice Type] Invoice(s)
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear All,
Please find attached your invoice(s).
If you have any questions, please contact us at aviationleasemanagement@Carlyle.aero.
Kind Regards,
Carlyle Aviation Lease Management Team
